title: citrus zeylanica
intro: Citrus zeylanica, also known as the Ceylon lemon or water lemon, is a species of citrus tree native to Sri Lanka and other parts of South Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Citrus zeylanica include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory problems such as asthma and bronchitis. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its essential oil is extracted for use in aromatherapy and skincare products.
